ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Work class ID of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight for the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Education ID of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Education number of the individual */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Marital status ID of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Occupation ID of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Relationship ID of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Race ID of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES work_classes ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., Masters, HS-grad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class (e.g., Private, State-gov) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., Separated, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation (e.g., Exec-managerial, Tech-support) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income data record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the demographic data table */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source (e.g., Survey, Census) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data_sources" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the demographic data table */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data sources table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id", "data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data_sources" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the income data table */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data sources table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id", "data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)
